title: dryopteris megaphylla
intro: Dryopteris megaphylla, also known as the Elkhorn Fern or Megaphyll fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris megaphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
